messages.content: # Want to remove the snow effect when it starts raining? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
## Step 1
> Put your mouse on the right side of the screen and search `Pure Planner`.

## Step 2
> Click the `glowing blue P` on the side of the app and click on the `current weather`.

## Step 3
> `Uncheck the box` next to `Air Temperature` and increase it to `above 3.0c` and the snow will turn off.

# Method 2
## Step 1
> Put your mouse on the right side of the screen and search `Pure Config`.

## Step 2
> Select the `Weather` tab, uncheck the `weather.use_weather_particles` box, then click save to permanently disable the effect.
